name: Deriv Digit Bot
description: Plain JavaScript Deriv Digit Over/Under bot with a realtime dashboard.

DERIV_API_TOKEN.description: Deriv authorization token with trade scope.

DERIV_ACCOUNT_ID.description: Optional Deriv account ID to pin a specific demo or real account.

DEFAULT_MODE.description: Default account mode shown when the dashboard opens.

DERIV_APP_ID.description: App ID from a PAT application you registered on developers.deriv.com.

MONGODB_URL.description: MongoDB connection string used to persist runs, logs, and resume snapshots.

MONGODB_DB.description: MongoDB database name for this app.

DASHBOARD_PASSWORD.description: Basic-auth password for the dashboard. Set this before exposing the app publicly.

BASE_STAKE_PERCENT.description: Growth mode stake as a fraction of session balance.

RISKY_STAKE_PERCENT.description: Risky jump stake as a fraction of session balance.

MARTINGALE_CAP_PERCENT.description: Maximum stake exposure as a fraction of remaining balance.

GROWTH_MILESTONE_PERCENT.description: Profit progress needed before the growth stake floor steps up again.

GROWTH_STAKE_BUMP_PERCENT.description: How much the growth stake floor rises at each mini milestone.

GROWTH_STAKE_CAP_PERCENT.description: Maximum growth-mode stake as a fraction of session balance.

PROFIT_GATE_PERCENT.description: Profit increment needed before the bot attempts a higher-risk cycle.

PROFIT_AGGRESSION.description: Dashboard default for compact-target aggression, from 1 conservative to 5 most aggressive.

RECOVERY_BUFFER_PERCENT.description: Extra profit margin added to recovery stakes so they can reclaim the protected floor faster.

ALL_IN_LOSS_STREAK_THRESHOLD.description: Consecutive completed losses before the emergency all-in recovery shot can arm.

ALL_IN_STAKE_PERCENT.description: Fraction of remaining session balance used by the emergency all-in recovery shot.

BLIND_SNIPER_ENABLED.description: Enable the blind sniper overlay on top of the normal growth/risky/martingale loop.

BLIND_SNIPER_CADENCE_TRADES.description: How many completed trades must pass before the next blind sniper shot can arm.

BLIND_SNIPER_MAX_USES.description: Maximum blind sniper shots allowed in a single seed-to-target run.

BLIND_SNIPER_START_RATIO.description: Session progress ratio needed before blind sniper can arm.

BLIND_SNIPER_MILESTONES.description: Comma-separated sniper progress marks. Values above 1 are treated as percentages; negative marks are allowed.

BLIND_SNIPER_STAKE_FRACTION.description: Fraction of the current session balance used for each blind sniper shot.

WINDOW_SIZE.description: Digits to track when comparing Over 1 and Under 8 frequency.

GUIDE_FILTERS.description: Enable the extra entry filters from the strategy notes.

STRICT_BAR_FILTERS.description: Enable the stricter bar filters for entries.
